calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Objection To Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua La Poll for administrator Ken-Ton Chong (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Third Report on Status of Administration.

Mr. La Poll reported that the administrator is seeking to address a potential undervaluation in the inventory and appraisal and that the probate referee is no longer available.

The Court stated that any objection to the inventory and appraisal must be litigated and directed counsel to file a proposal addressing how the issue will be resolved. The Court set a hearing for May 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for status of the objection to the inventory and appraisal.

The Court took the Amended Third Report on Status of Administration under submission with the intent to grant, extending time to administer the estate to June 29, 2026.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
